blog_title: 240 GSM vs 200 GSM Plain T-Shirt — Why Heavier Feels Cheap and Yarn Quality Matters More
caption:
Same price, opposite feels. 240 GSM felt rough. 200 GSM felt premium. 😬

Here's the trap: GSM ≠ quality. Open-end yarn makes fabric thick but scratchy (costs ₹15-20 less per kg). Ring-spun combed cotton? Softer, sharper prints, zero pilling.

Rub it on your cheek before ordering your next 500 pieces.

Save this if you're sourcing bulk blanks 👇
